title: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp Fight Back
description: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp enter Satori’s bizarre ordeal, where harmless-looking balls become deadly traps.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Narrator, Satori, Luffy, Sanji. Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp enter Satori’s bizarre ordeal, where harmless-looking balls become deadly traps.

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: He has finally stepped upon upper yard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The enemy's enemy is our friend!!

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: You will only be in the way!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is that well really that significant?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't see God at this rate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami! See anything from up there?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, why don't you say something?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can it be? This island is...

summary: Luffy, Sanji, and Usopp enter Satori’s bizarre ordeal, where harmless-looking balls become deadly traps.
